blocks.text: Worktype mix | Outsourced scope concentrates in piping, structural, and coatings.[ stacked column: outsourced $ by worktype, Virginia / Columbia / DDG-51 ]Three worktypes hold ~70% of outsourced scope.- piping and structural lead every yard- coatings rises post-FY26 on Columbia- electrical stays concentrated in one incumbentSource: FSRS/SAM.gov first-tier subawards; workbook tab Worktype Shares.
